login.heading: Glad To Have You Back!

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose which languages this institute's portal offers and how content is localized.
language.defaultHelp: The language users see before they pick one themselves.
language.enabledHelp: Languages users can switch to. The default language is always included.
language.contentSourceHelp: The language your content is originally authored in.
language.timezoneHelp: Used for date and time display across the portal.
